text.content: Add image generation to Spark using Hugging Face Inference API (free tier, ~1000 req/month). Model: black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell. Flow: Spark generates image prompt from post content → calls HF API → saves image locally → uploads to LinkedIn Assets API → attaches to post. Requires: (1) Ken creates HF account + API key → store in Keychain, (2) Spark SOUL/RULES update, (3) LinkedIn image upload code. Dependency: TKT-0121 (local fallback option).
